title: deyeuxia filiformis var. lyallii
intro: Deyeuxia filiformis var. lyallii, also known as the Lyall's grass, is a type of plant native to New Zealand. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Deyeuxia filiformis var. lyallii is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal uses, although the specific methods of preparation and dosage may vary depending on the intended application.
